name: Form Validation
description: Validates user input on form submission and communicates errors inline.

agentDocumentBlocks.purpose: Guide multi-component composition for surfacing, communicating, and resolving form validation errors.

items.description: Use form-validation for input errors the user can fix at the field; use alert for system or status messages not tied to a field.
Use form-validation to communicate failure; success confirmation belongs to a toast, which never carries errors.

items.guidance: Always include both an inline field error and a summary when multiple fields fail.
Do not use toast notifications as the sole error communication for form validation.
Do not show errors only on submit with no inline field feedback.
items.rationale: Users fix problems fastest at the field. Show inline errors on blur and collect them in a summary on submit.
